words.def: sealed vessel where water is converted to steam
words.zh: n. 煮器, 汽鍋, 鍋爐

words.def: the actions and activities assigned to or required or expected of a person or group
words.zh: n. 角色, 職責, 任務

words.def: a slippery or viscous liquid or liquefiable substance not miscible with water
words.zh: n. 油, 石油, 油畫顏料

words.def: a mineral that contains metal that is valuable enough to be mined
a statement that deviates from or perverts the truth
words.zh: n. 謊言, 假象, 位置

words.def: take something away by force or without the consent of the owner
words.zh: v. 搶奪, 搶掠, 剝奪
